title: Who Won Golden Globes for 2026 - CBS News
text: According to CBS News' coverage of the 2026 Golden Globes ceremony held January 11, Rhea Seehorn claimed the award for Best Actress in a TV Series — Drama for her role in "Pluribus." The other nominees competing in this category were Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Britt Lower ("Severance"), Helen Mirren ("Mobland"), Bella Ramsey ("The Last of Us"), and Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"). The ceremony was hosted by Nikki Glaser and aired live on CBS and Paramount+.
